product.name: 46"x76" Extra Large Arched Full Length Mirror - Leaning Mirror Arch Wall-Mounted Mirrors - Aluminum Alloy Frame Modern Simple Home Decor - for Living Room Bedroom Cloakroom
features: Black Full-Length Mirror: This 46" x 76" mirror is ideal for showcasing your entire figure. The mirror top design adds visual height and makes it a decorative addition to your home. Add functionality and style to your space with this mirror and elevate your mood

Aluminum Alloy Frame: Our full-body mirror features a high-quality aluminum alloy frame, ensuring durability and a sleek appearance. The slim and lightweight design of the frame makes it easy to move around. Additionally, the premium metal frame is resistant to corrosion in humid environments, making our full-length mirror suitable for use in bathrooms

High Definition and Explosion-Proof: Our full-length wall mirror is crafted from high-quality float glass, providing ultra-high-definition imaging and distortion-free reflection. The back is covered with an explosion-proof film, ensuring safety in case of accidental damage

Versatile Placement: Our multifunctional mirror offers flexible placement options. It can be tilted against the wall, wall-mounted vertically, or placed using the U-shaped stand. The backside hooks make it suitable for various rooms, from closets to bedrooms and beyond. Enjoy its versatility and functionality in any space

Customer Service: Our product philosophy prioritizes customer service. If the floor mirror you receive is damaged or you are unsatisfied with our products, we offer 24/7 customer service to address your needs
